tool_input.description: Read sections using absolute script path

tool_input.command:
jq -r --arg sec "s1" '
    (if . == null then error("FILE_NOT_FOUND") else . end) |
    . as $root |
    if (.sections | length) == 0 then
      "# " + $root.title + "\n" + ($root.content // "")
    else
      ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s |
      if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND"
      else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content
      end
    end
  ' "knowledge/development-tools/testing-framework/testing-framework-01-entityUnitTestWithBeanValidation.json" 2>&1 | head -5
tool_input.description: Test jq directly on the file

tool_input.command:
cat knowledge/development-tools/testing-framework/testing-framework-01-entityUnitTestWithBeanValidation.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print('Title:', data.get('title'))
print('Sections:', [s['id'] for s in data.get('sections', [])])
"
tool_input.description: Parse knowledge file with Python to check structure
